title: Hazards
excerpt: Rules for environmental dangers like fire and falling.
markdown:
# Hazards

Monsters are the main perils characters face, but other dangers await. The rules glossary defines the following hazards:

> > **Burning**
>
> > **Dehydration**
>
> > **Falling**
>
> > **Malnutrition**
>
> > **Suffocation**
